description.1: This package consists of a two-layer structure, similar to a dropdown wrapping another dropdown
description.2: The HTML content of the option is copied to serve as the display for the tag
description.3: *Or you can also generate options using data
description.4: In the end, an object containing keys and values will be output

setup.global: In main.js you can mount it as a global Vue component

app.debugLog: Whether to display console.log in the browser's developer tools
app.create: Allow creating tags from input value
app.create__notice: When both create and search are false, the input will not accept text
app.clearable: Whether to enable the clear button
app.merge: Merge tags with the same key into one
app.keyboard__detail: After the component gains focus, use the following keys to operate; left and right arrow keys to edit tags
app.tagPosition: The placement of tags. By default, positioned to the left of the input. Can be changed to above or below
app.tagPosition__notice: Whether above or below does not affect keyboard operations

conjunction__parameters.null: - : When a tag is completed, the 'OR' mode button appears at the top (default)
conjunction__parameters.OR: OR: Always show options that can still be selected
conjunction__parameters.AND: AND: Only show unselected dropdowns (filtered by key)

app.deleteIcon__notice: In edit mode, the keyboard delete key still works

deleteIcon__parameters.edit: edit: Only visible in edit mode
deleteIcon__parameters.none: none: Never visible *can only delete via keyboard

app.placeholder: Placeholder text, please choose one of the following to use

placeholder__details.placeholder: A string type, same as an input's placeholder
placeholder__details.placeholders: An object type that stores placeholders for different scenarios

placeholders.initial: Initial default text, only enabled when there are no tags
placeholders.loading__notice: Only enabled when the loading attribute is true
placeholders.selectDown: Text displayed after all options have been selected
placeholders.selectDown__notice: Only enabled when the create attribute is true
placeholders.finish: Text displayed when all selections are complete
placeholders.finish__notice: Only enabled when the create attribute is false
placeholders.tagValueRepeat: Displayed when a duplicate tag value is detected
placeholders.tagValueRepeat__notice: Only flashes twice then disappears after focusing on the tag element

slots.v-tag-dropdown: Container for dropdown menus. Use the <v-tag-dropdown> component
slots.v-tag-option: Options within a dropdown menu. Use the <v-tag-option> component
slots.loading__notice: Only works when the loading attribute is true
slots.dropdown-loading: Loading template for the dropdown section
slots.dropdown-loading__notice: Only applies to the dropdown section's loading template
slots.tag-conjunction: Conjunction symbol between merged tag values
slots.tag-conjunction__notice: Only works when the merge attribute is true
slots.option-undo: Undo option template in the dropdown
slots.option-undo__notice: Only displayed after selecting a title <v-tag-option>
slots.option-OR-conjunction: OR conjunction option template in the dropdown
slots.option-OR-conjunction__notice: Only displayed when the conjunction attribute is null

events.focus: Triggered when the component gains focus
events.blur: Triggered when the component loses focus

status__parameter_extended_description.finish: All options are completed and create is false
status__parameter_extended_description.delect-down: All options are completed but create is true

events.clear: Triggered when the user clicks the clear button
events.inputValue: Gets the current value of the input
events.visibleChange: Triggered when the dropdown menu appears or disappears
events.removeTag: Triggered when a tag is removed
events.selectingTag: Gets the currently selected tag (including selecting and editing states)

exposes.blur: Blurs the component's input and hides the dropdown menu
exposes.pushTag: Programmatically push a tag to the component

pushTag__details.sub-description: Creates a new tag or combines with an existing tag based on the parameters and current component state

no-key.description: When the parameter (tag object) has no key | No key provided
no-key.1: If currently in selecting mode, it will match the current <v-tag-dropdown> | In selecting mode
no-key.2: Otherwise, it will directly generate the tag | Not in selecting mode

has-key.description: When the parameter (tag object) has a key | A key is provided
has-key.1: If a <v-tag-dropdown> with the same key exists, it will automatically match and complete that tag, regardless of selecting mode | Same key exists
has-key.2: If no <v-tag-dropdown> with a matching key exists, it will directly generate the tag | No matching key

demo0.description: When adding components inside <v-tag-option>, this method must be used
demo0.notice: To input external values, do not fill in the value of <v-tag-option>
demo0.comment: This example uses the following packages

demo1.title: Try it out
demo1.description: The submit button will delay sending for
demo1.sub-description: After clicking the button, please proceed to operate immediately

parameter.valueElm: HTML element for the value display
parameter.titleElm: HTML element for the title display
parameter.custom: After completing the tag, whether to allow freely modifying the tag value
parameter.displayValue: After completing the tag, whether to display the raw value instead

dropdown.class: HTML element class, will be applied to the completed tag
dropdown.display-all: Whether to show all options in this dropdown (both title and options)
dropdown.custom: Whether to allow freely modifying the tag value
dropdown.disabled: Whether to disable all options in this dropdown
dropdown.divided: Whether to display a top divider

value__notices.0: Filled: Assigns dropdown values upon click
value__notices.1: Not filled: No click event and no dropdown values assigned
value__notices.2: To assign dropdown values without filling, use the pushTag method

option.title: Starting point of the dropdown; other options will be hidden

title__notices.1: Other options are only displayed when the display-all parameter is true or when no title option exists in the dropdown
title__notices.2: A dropdown can have no title option at all

option.no_title: A dropdown without a title option will always display all options, regardless of the display-all parameter
option.display-value: Display the raw value instead of the HTML-rendered template
option.divided: Whether to display a bottom divider
option.selected: Whether this option is selected by default
option.element: Displayed HTML element *If not present, the value will be displayed

intro.wellcome: Welcome to the documentation and examples page
intro.pages: Here you will find more parameters and example pages
intro.frameworks: You can switch between different CSS frameworks
intro.colorTheme: There is also a light and dark mode!

page.basic: Simplest usage — no slots, no parameters, just a basic tag bar
page.addOption: Add dropdown functionality using <v-tag-dropdown> and <v-tag-option> slots

addOption__details.2: <v-tag-option> : Represents the tag value, must be inside a <v-tag-dropdown>
addOption__details.3: If a <v-tag-option> is set as title, other options are hidden until the title is clicked

sentence.The_attributes_changes_in_this_demo_will: The attribute changes in this demo will only affect the first dropdown
sentence.Some_attributes_will_change_the_second_d: Some attributes will change the second dropdown
sentence.The_attributes_changes_in_this_demo_will: The attribute changes in this demo will only affect the first option (title)
The attribute changes in this demo will only affect the second option
sentence.Some_attributes_will_change_the_second_o: Some attributes will change the second option

notice.click_the_tag_to_edit_mode: Click the tag value area to enter edit mode

hidden.title: Simple Hidden Method

mains.1: Provides a simple way to hide elements using class names within <v-tag-option>
mains.2: Since the HTML content of the option is copied, custom styles can also be added

hidden.v-hidden-in-tag: Hidden only after becoming a tag

mains.1: To modify styles yourself, follow the classList of the main structure below
mains.2: *To modify the spacing (CSS: gap) of v-tag, refer to the next section
mains.3: *Content after double slashes ( // ) is automatically added based on the current operation or parameter settings

mains.1: The class name defined in <v-tag-dropdown> will be applied to the v-tag
Due to layout constraints, v-tags within div.v-tags-multiselect__main do not use CSS gap for spacing
mains.2: Use CSS :root to override the default value (3px) as shown in the example below

mains.1: This method does not conflict with slot <v-tag-dropdown> and slot <v-tag-option>; both can be used together
mains.2: You can use a basic object to input key-values *demo1
mains.3: Or use an object array *demo3&4 for detailed parameter settings; the same applies to values

first.title: First Layer Object Parameters
first.main: Similar to <v-tag-dropdown>, but with an additional required 'values' field

second.title: Second Layer Object Parameters
second.main: Similar to <v-tag-option>, but with an additional 'element' field
